meaning: n.决心v.决心,决定,决心要,(使)分解,溶解,解决vt.解决
examples: Nothing could weaken his resolve to continue.
How can we resolve this apparent contradiction?
We have to resolve this matter once and for all.
The festival seeks to resolve conflict, strengthen community bonds and hopefully, arrive at a greater peace.
So what are the benefits of this approach and how do they help resolve the debate?
